issues.detail: Reference to a supply contract dated 6 March 2025 is not supported by the case record
Reference number CASE-2026-984 is not present in the case record
The draft states the Master Services Agreement was executed on 16 January 2024, which is not present in the case record.
Reference to contract dated 11 de setembro de 2025 and clause fourth not present in the case record
Statement that the monthly rent is € 3.327,15, while the record only lists an amount at stake of 3327.15 without specifying it as rent
Draft cites process number 9028/25.3T8LSB and Tribunal Judicial da Comarca do Porto, which are not present in the provided case record.
The draft states that the proceedings were opened on 10 May 2026, which is not present in the provided case record.
Draft cites Regulation (EEC, Euratom) No 1182/71 as the basis for the 90‑day calculation, which is not present in the case record.
The draft states it lacks lawyer review, a fact not present in the case record.
The draft states the lease was celebrated on 26 de janeiro de 2024, which is not present in the case record.
Draft references a supply contract dated 29 de junho de 2024, which is not present in the case record.
Reference number CASE-2025-385 is not present in the provided case record.
Master Services Agreement execution date 12 March 2025 is not supported by the record
Computation of deadline is attributed to Regulation (EEC, Euratom) No 1182/71, which is not mentioned in the record
The draft specifies an office number "OF-2025/79104" which is not present in the case record.
Draft mentions opposition to renewal of a lease contract dated 11 May 2023, which is not present in the case record.
The draft cites a judicial process number (6301/24.8T8LSB) that is not present in the provided case record.
Draft cites Regulation (EEC, Euratom) No 1182/71 as the basis for computing the deadline, which is not present in the case record.
The draft cites a supply contract dated 26 de julho de 2025, which is not mentioned in the case record.
Draft cites Regulation (EEC, Euratom) No 1182/71 as the basis for the deadline, which is not mentioned in the case record.
Draft states the deadline is 90 days from the notice, but the record specifies a 60‑day period; the date given (2026‑11‑09) corresponds to 60 days, creating a contradictory claim.
Draft states it lacks lawyer review, which is not mentioned in the case record.
The draft includes an office number (OF-2024/60470) that is not present in the case record.
